SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JESSE CHEN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JULIA WEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JON DIRIENZO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, JESSE WEN, JULIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIRIENZO, JON $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE 2079 ET SEG. DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR THE PARKING FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
